# opnsense_haproxy_server (Data Source)

Read an OPNsense HAProxy real server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the HAProxy real server.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) Server address.
- `advanced` (String) Advanced HAProxy server options.
- `check_down_interval` (String) Health check interval while down.
- `check_interval` (String) Health check interval.
- `checkport` (String) Health check port override.
- `description` (String) Optional description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this HAProxy real server is enabled.
- `internal_id` (String) Internal HAProxy server id assigned by OPNsense.
- `linked_resolver` (String) Linked HAProxy resolver UUID.
- `max_connections` (String) Maximum concurrent connections.
- `mode` (String) Server mode.
- `multiplexer_protocol` (String) HAProxy multiplexer protocol.
- `name` (String) HAProxy real server name.
- `number` (String) Number of servers for template servers.
- `port` (String) Server port.
- `resolve_prefer` (String) Preferred resolved address family.
- `resolver_opts` (Set of String) Resolver options.
- `service_name` (String) Service name for template servers.
- `source` (String) Source address.
- `ssl` (Boolean) Whether SSL is enabled.
- `ssl_ca` (String) CA certificate UUID.
- `ssl_client_certificate` (String) Client certificate UUID.
- `ssl_crl` (String) CRL UUID.
- `ssl_sni` (String) Static SNI value.
- `ssl_sni_expr` (String) SNI expression.
- `ssl_verify` (Boolean) Whether server certificate verification is enabled.
- `type` (String) Server type.
- `unix_socket` (String) Linked Unix socket UUID.
- `weight` (String) Server weight.
